In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] participated in a '''space battle''' alongside a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that consisted of [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] and [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]]. Aboard his [[Saesee Tiin's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor|Eta-2 starfighter]], the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|engaged]] three [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|tri-fighter droids]] in the midst of the [[Space warfare/Legends|conflict]]. The [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] overwhelmed Tiin, forcing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to remain on the defensive. Tiin was saved from [[Death/Legends|death]] by the [[Time/Legends|timely]] arrival of Jedi [[General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who destroyed the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] with his [[Anakin Skywalker's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|starfighter's]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

==The battle==
[[File:Tiin_Battle.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Saesee Tiin in his starfighter during the battle]]
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the third [[Standard year/Legends|year]]<ref name="chee" /> of the the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] participated in a [[Space warfare/Legends|space battle]]<ref name="cw22" /> that was part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] campaign.<ref name="chee" /> Tiin—along with a Republic [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] that consisted of at least four [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] and accompanying [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]]—fought against two [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyers]] and additional [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|tri-fighter droids]]. In the midst of the battle, Tiin, who was aboard his [[Saesee Tiin's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptor]], was the target of three tri-fighter [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. After engaging the [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] in [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]], Tiin was forced to stay on the defensive, being gradually overwhelmed by the droids' [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire.<ref name="cw22" />

Tiin struggled to maneuver his [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|interceptor]] away from the pursuing droids' [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire. Aboard his own [[Anakin Skywalker's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|starfighter]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] arrived to aid Tiin and destroyed all three attacking droids with his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. After saving Tiin, Skywalker, flanked by several of the battle group's ARC-170 starfighters, took out other tri-fighter droids near the ''Venator''-class [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].<ref name="cw22" />

==Behind the scenes==
The space battle involving Saesee Tiin first appeared in the [[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|twenty-second chapter]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television series, which aired on [[March 22]], [[2005]].<ref name="imdb">{{IMDb|url=title/tt0859544|text="Star Wars: Clone Wars" Chapter 22 (TV episode 2005) - IMDb}}</ref>
